Name: Tree
Behavior: Neutral, drops fruit or Crate on death as well as 3 Materials.

Name: Baby Alien
Behavior: Chases the character, deals damage on touch

Name: Chaser
Behavior: Chases the character, deals damage on touch, spawns in groups

Name: Spitter
Behavior: Runs away from the character if too close, fires projectiles that deal damage on hit

Name: Charger
Behavior: Chases the character, can charge with cooldown of 2.5-3.5 seconds, damages on touch

Name: Pursuer
Behavior: Chases the character, damages on touch, keeps getting faster each second

Name: Bruiser
Behavior: Chases the character, can charge with cooldown of 2.5-3.5 seconds, damages on touch

Name: Buffer
Behavior: Runs away from the character, Buffs other enemies' health by 150%, damage by 25%, and speed by 50%. Buffed enemies are outlined in red

Name: Fly
Behavior: Moves around player. Fires projectiles in random directions when hit by the player's projectiles. Melee Weapons can safely hit the Fly without spawning Projectiles.

Name: Healer
Behavior: Moves around enemies, healing enemies around it for 100(increasing by 10 each wave)

Name: Looter
Behavior: Runs away from the character, drops a Loot Crate and 8 Materials on death Has 10% chance to spawn 25 seconds into a wave, and every 15 seconds thereafter.

Name: Helmet Alien
Behavior: Chases the character, deals damage on touch

Name: Fin Alien
Behavior: Chases the character, deals damage on touch

Name: Spawner
Behavior: Spawns 3 Junkie Aliens on death

Name: Junkie
Behavior: Moves around player, fires projectiles near player that deals damage

Name: Horned Bruiser
Behavior: Chases the character, can charge with cooldown of 2.5-3.5 seconds, damages on touch

Name: Horned Charger
Behavior: Chases the character, can charge with cooldown of 2.5-3.5 seconds, damages on touch

Name: Slasher Egg
Behavior: Stays still, dies and spawns a Slasher after 5 seconds unless killed

Name: Slasher
Behavior: Follows the character, runs away if too close, slashes vertically dealing damage from medium range

Name: Tentacle
Behavior: Follows the character, runs away if too close, attacks in "V" shape from medium range

Name: Lamprey
Behavior: Spawns on the wave Bait is bought. Follows the player, charges to the player every 1.5 seconds, shooting projectiles to its left and right during the charge

Name: Gobbler
Behavior: Target materials to eat them, dealing damage on touch. Eating makes it grow. Has 3% chance to spawn 10 seconds into a wave. Mutation 0: Fast but fragile. Killing it makes it drop all the materials it ate. Mutation 1: Loses speed but gains max HP. Killing it makes it drop twice the amount of materials it ate. Mutation 2: Loses more speed but gains even more max HP. Killing it makes it drop three times the amount of materials it ate.
